title: cleome augustinensis var. goudotii
intro: Cleome augustinensis var. goudotii, also known as Goudot's bee flower or spider flower, is a plant species within the Cleome genus, characterized by its vibrant flowers and unique, delicate appearance. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Cleome augustinensis var. goudotii include its potential to alleviate skin irritations and promote wound healing, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
